channel.title: GitHub Unknown languages Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Unknown languages in GitHub

item.description: A complete computer science study plan to become a software engineer.

item.description: List of 300 Angular Interview Questions and answers

item.title: Rem0o/FanControl.Releases
item.description: This is the release repository for Fan Control, a highly customizable fan controlling software for Windows.

item.title: trimstray/the-book-of-secret-knowledge
item.description: A collection of inspiring lists, manuals, cheatsheets, blogs, hacks, one-liners, cli/web tools and more.

item.title: Hack-with-Github/Awesome-Hacking
item.description: A collection of various awesome lists for hackers, pentesters and security researchers

item.title: microsoft/PowerAppsCodeApps
item.description: Create custom web application to run within Power Apps!
